vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is a 23-year-old B.Sc CS graduate operating a cyber cafe, solving local computer problems with 2 years of informal experience.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of formal recognition and a structured career path for his existing technical skills.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to convert his daily problem-solving experience into a recognized IT helpdesk role with a stable income.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You understand basic computer components, network connectivity, and apply logical steps to solve common IT issues.
milestones.identity_statement: I am building the core understanding to diagnose and resolve everyday tech challenges.

science.desc: A user reports their printer is not working after a Windows update. Walk through the troubleshooting steps.
A user cannot access shared network drives. Diagnose the potential network issues.
How would you explain the importance of strong passwords and multi-factor authentication to a non-technical user?

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can explain how different system components interact, configure advanced network settings, and understand basic database concepts.
milestones.identity_statement: I am expanding my knowledge to understand the interconnectedness of IT systems and their underlying structure.

video.title: Deep Dive into CPU and RAM

scenario.title: Choosing Components for a Specific User Need

video.title: Setting Up a Basic Virtual Machine

science.desc: A user wants to run an old application that is incompatible with their current OS. How would you advise them using virtualization?

scenario.title: Analyzing Network Traffic with Wireshark Basics

video.title: Using RDP and TeamViewer for Remote Support

science.desc: Explain the difference between a router and a switch, and when you would use each in a small office network.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can systematically diagnose complex software and network issues, interpret system logs, and apply structured debugging techniques.
milestones.identity_statement: I am becoming a skilled troubleshooter, capable of solving more intricate technical problems.

scenario.title: Investigating a System Crash with Event Logs

video.title: Using Task Manager and Resource Monitor

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Slow Computer with Performance Tools

science.desc: A critical business application is crashing intermittently. How would you use system logs and performance monitors to pinpoint the issue?

scenario.title: Documenting a New Software Installation Process
Explaining a Technical Issue to a Non-Technical User

science.desc: Describe a time you had to troubleshoot a complex problem without a clear solution. What was your process?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can implement advanced security measures, respond to common security incidents, and manage user accounts and permissions effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: I am evolving into a guardian of digital safety, protecting systems and users from threats.

scenario.title: Setting Up New User Accounts with Appropriate Permissions
Responding to a Suspected Malware Infection

video.title: Steps in a Security Incident Response

science.desc: A user reports suspicious activity on their account, including emails sent without their knowledge. Outline your immediate response plan.

video.title: Introduction to Google Drive and OneDrive

scenario.title: Recommending Cloud Storage Solutions for Users

science.desc: What steps would you take if a user accidentally deleted critical files from a shared network drive?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can write simple scripts to automate repetitive IT tasks, improving efficiency and reducing manual effort.
milestones.identity_statement: I am leveraging automation to make IT support more efficient and scalable.

modules.title: Python for IT Automation Basics
lessons: Introduction to APIs for IT Tools

scenario.title: Writing a Script to List Large Files on a Drive

video.title: Making Basic API Requests with Python

scenario.title: Automating a Simple Web Task with an API

science.desc: You need to regularly check the status of several network services. How would you write a Python script to automate this check and report any offline services?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can apply your knowledge to solve complex, multi-faceted IT problems through realistic case studies and simulated environments.
milestones.identity_statement: I am honing my skills by tackling real-world challenges, preparing for any IT support situation.

video.title: Analyzing a Full Network Outage Scenario

scenario.title: Simulating a Critical Network Service Failure

video.title: Communicating with Hardware and Software Vendors

scenario.title: Escalating a Hardware Failure to a Vendor

science.desc: A new employee needs full system setup, including software installation, network access, and email configuration. Outline the entire onboarding process.

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are fully prepared for IT Helpdesk interviews, understand career progression, and can confidently articulate your skills and experience.
milestones.identity_statement: I am ready to confidently step into a formal IT Helpdesk role and build a recognized career.

modules.title: IT Career Pathways & Interview Prep
lessons: Resume & Cover Letter for IT Helpdesk
Career Advancement Paths (e.g., SysAdmin, Network Admin)

science.desc: Conduct a full mock IT Helpdesk interview, covering technical questions, behavioral scenarios, and problem-solving approaches.
